== Notes for [[Item:Q106699|Q106699]] ==

Yahya married his cousin, Mahba bint Amr ibn Ali ibn al-Husayn (AS). [29] Most historians and genealogists have not mentioned a son for Yahya; Rather, it is said that he died at a young age; But Hamdallah Mostofi considered a person named Abdullah Ibn Yahya as one of his children who was known as Talib al-Haqq. [30] Ibn Jibar also mentioned a girl named Zainab bint Yahya Ibn Zayd Ibn Imam Sajjad (AS). The shrine of Zainab bint Yahya is known in Egypt. [32]

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000042354175223

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
